mano_cua.result_summary: 页面全局loading卡死，所有URL路径均显示loading spinner和ElementAdmin文字，从未加载出实际内容。尝试了刷新、硬刷新、直接导航到/#/login和/#/list/search-table均无效。与batch 26相同问题（vite-plugin-mock@2.9.6与Node23不兼容）
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application is stuck in an infinite loading state. The spinner keeps animating but actual page content never loads. Confirmed across all URL paths including /#/, /#/login, /#/list/search-table. Browser-level page loading is complete but the app-level global loading never resolves.
